Hero.title: Nurturing Hearts and Heads
Hero.subtitle: A bright space for moms to find creative homeschool inspiration and rooted Christian encouragement. Founded by Bruna & Vitoria.

Posts.author: By {name}
Posts.easter_title: The Empty Tomb: A Heart-Rooted Easter for Little Hands
Posts.easter_excerpt: A week dedicated to hope, learning, and communion. A precious time to gather the family and honor the greatest act of love and redemption in history: Jesus' sacrifice for each one of us.
Posts.welcome_excerpt: A bright space for moms to find creative homeschool inspiration and rooted Christian encouragement. Founded by Bruna & Vitoria.

About.title: About Us
About.vitoria_bio: Hi, I'm Vitoria! I'm a former educator turned homeschooling mom of three. My passion lies in creating structured yet flexible rhythms that allow children to explore their curiosities while staying grounded in the Word of God.
About.vitoria_extra: When I'm not planning our next unit study, you can find me in the garden or with a cup of earl grey tea and a good biography.
About.bruna_bio: Hello! I'm Bruna. I've always believed that art and faith are deeply intertwined. As a mother of two, I focus on bringing creativity into every aspect of our homeschool journey—from watercolor nature journals to musical memory work.
About.bruna_extra: I love exploring local trails with my family and finding beauty in the small, everyday moments that point us back to our Creator.
About.vision_text: Pencils & Prayers was born out of a shared desire to support other mothers in their homeschooling journeys. We believe that education is not just about textbooks, but about nurturing the heart and soul of each child through a lens of faith, creativity, and intentionality.

Contact.title: Get in Touch
Contact.intro: Have a question about homeschooling, motherhood, or just want to share a word of encouragement? We'd love to hear from you. Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you as soon as we can.
Contact.placeholder_message: Tell us what's on your heart...

Footer.verse: "Direct your children onto the right path, and when they are older, they will not leave it."
Footer.tagline: Biblical Home Education, Homemaking and Healthy Living

Newsletter.title: Brighten Your Inbox
Newsletter.text: Weekly printables, creative lessons, and grace-filled encouragement for your motherhood journey.

ComingSoon.title: Something beautiful is blossoming
ComingSoon.subtitle: We're currently preparing our space to share inspiration, creativity, and faith with you. Join our newsletter to be the first to know when we launch.
